loop: Ralph Wiggum Loop - Iteration 2 - Security Stage Complete
status: Security Stage COMPLETE - All security checks passed
summary: Security stage completed successfully. Key improvements: (1) Added SecurityHeadersMiddleware with X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Content-Security-Policy, Permissions-Policy, HSTS (production only); (2) Fixed /api/auth/me endpoint to require Bearer token authentication (was unauthenticated - real security vulnerability); (3) Restricted CORS allow_headers from wildcard to specific allowed headers; (4) Restricted CORS allow_methods to explicit list; (5) Added 20 security tests covering OWASP Top 10 categories; (6) npm audit: 0 vulnerabilities; (7) No XSS vulnerabilities (no dangerouslySetInnerHTML); (8) Server tests increased from 73 to 93 (20 new security tests); (9) All 2421 total tests pass (2328 client + 93 server).
next_action: Advance to done stage - all quality gates passed
